title: Stability AI Image Generation
description: Schema representing the configuration and response structures for Stability AI image generation operations including text-to-image, image-to-image, editing, upscaling, and control-guided generation.

Prompt.description: Text prompt configuration for guiding image generation.

text.description: Text describing what should appear in the generated image. Strong, descriptive prompts that clearly define elements, colors, and subjects lead to better results.

weight.description: The weight of the prompt relative to other prompts. Higher values give this prompt more influence.

AspectRatio.description: The aspect ratio of the generated image.

OutputFormat.description: The output format of the generated image.

Seed.description: A value to control randomness in generation. Set to 0 for a random seed. Using the same seed with the same parameters produces similar results.

GenerationModel.description: The model variant used for generation.

GenerationMode.description: The generation mode indicating whether this is a text-to-image or image-to-image operation.

GenerationResult.description: The result of an image generation operation.

AsyncGeneration.description: Response for an asynchronous generation that must be polled for results.

id.description: The unique generation ID used to poll for results.

status.description: The current status of the generation.

EditOperation.description: The type of image editing operation.

ControlMethod.description: The method of structural control for image-to-image generation.

left.description: Number of pixels to extend to the left.

right.description: Number of pixels to extend to the right.

up.description: Number of pixels to extend upward.

down.description: Number of pixels to extend downward.

cfg_scale.description: Controls how closely the video follows the conditioning from the input image.

motion_bucket_id.description: Controls the amount of motion in the generated video.

Fast3DConfig.description: Configuration for Stable Fast 3D mesh generation.

texture_resolution.description: The resolution of the generated texture in pixels.

foreground_ratio.description: The ratio of the foreground object to the total image size.

remesh.description: The remeshing algorithm to apply to the generated mesh.

ApiError.description: An error response from the Stability AI API.

id.description: A unique identifier for the error instance.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.

strength.description: Controls how much influence the input image has on the output for image-to-image mode.

control_strength.description: Controls how closely the output follows the input control image.
